allTextElements.label: p "Hole-punch fresh spinach into discs, vac"
allTextElements.ownText: Hole-punch fresh spinach into discs, vacuum-soak in baking-soda water, watch them sink then float. Time how many surface in 5 min. Carbonate-dose CO₂ availability ≈ oxygen output. Materials: spinach, syringe, jar, baking soda.

allTextElements.fullText: A Belgian alchemist weighed soil and a tiny tree, watered it for five years, and found the soil barely lost weight while

allTextElements.label: p "A Belgian alchemist weighed soil and a t"
allTextElements.ownText: A Belgian alchemist weighed soil and a tiny tree, watered it for five years, and found the soil barely lost weight while the tree gained 74 kg. He blamed water (close, but missed CO₂). Use as a setup for what he couldn't measure — and we now can.
